description: Eval test cases for showtime-director SKILL.md system prompt injection

test_cases.name: High energy lineup
test_cases.prompt: I have high energy today. I need to spend 2 hours on deep work coding the API, 45 minutes at the gym, 30 minutes on email, and 20 minutes prepping for tomorrow's standup.

test_cases.name: Low energy + ADHD guardrails
test_cases.prompt: Low energy today. I feel like I've been lazy and unproductive all week. Just need to do some light email and maybe a short walk. 2 hours max.

test_cases.name: Director mode — overwhelmed user
test_cases.prompt: I can't do this today. Everything feels like too much. I just want to quit.

test_cases.name: Beat check — creative prompt, warm tone
test_cases.prompt: I just finished my deep work session on the API. It went okay I guess.

test_cases.name: Verdict — SOLID SHOW for 2/3 beats
test_cases.prompt: Time to strike the stage. I locked 2 beats out of my threshold of 3 today.
